post_study_work_visa.name: Post-Study Job Search Visa
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Must find employment related to studies. Minimum salary threshold for work permit conversion.

language_requirement: Programs taught in English. Spanish useful for local networking and employment.
scholarship_availability: Moderate — IESE, IE, and ESADE all offer merit and need-based scholarships. IE offers up to 50% tuition for top applicants.
path_to_pr: Work permit → long-term residence after 5 years of legal residence. Spain is one of the more accessible EU countries for PR.
test_policy: GMAT or GRE accepted. IE accepts its own Global Admissions Test (IE-GAT) as alternative.
